title: Automation erroneously creating multiple copies of subitems
excerpt: Hi everyone, I seem to have discovered a glitch in automation setup for multiple subitems. I have an automation set up that will automatically add 10 subitems when a lead status is changed. BUT, it is now creating 12 ite…

posts.author: sorensonsolutions (Sarah)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi everyone, I seem to have discovered a glitch in automation setup for multiple subitems. I have an automation set up that will automatically add 10 subitems when a lead status is changed. BUT, it is now creating 12 items, with one of those wrongly created items being a duplicate of another subitem, and the other being an empty subitem. I think this is a glitch…I’ve tried refreshing and turning the automation on and off…help!

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
If this is consistent, and you know you only have one automation set to create them, I’d reach out to the actual monday support team since they will likely want a ticket and you to grant access to your account for them to investigate something like this.

Assuming its not a third party app.
